name: Cybite Landing Page
description: A high-performance, modern landing page designed to capture attention and drive conversions through sleek UI/UX and lightning-fast load times.

details.overview: Engineered a high-conversion landing page architecture focusing on sub-second load times and robust component design. Leveraged a hybrid styling approach integrating Tailwind CSS with Mantine UI primitives to balance rapid deployment with strict accessibility standards.
features: Engaging Hero & Interactive UI that instantly grabs user attention
Dynamic Content Sliders for frictionless feature and testimonial discovery
Fully Responsive Layout optimized for all viewport sizes
technicalHighlights: Architected a hybrid PostCSS pipeline to synchronize CSS variables and prevent clashes between Tailwind's utility classes and Mantine's component ecosystem.
Fine-tuned the Vite build configuration to effectively chunk the React DOM and third-party libraries, significantly reducing the initial JavaScript payload.
Managed complex, touch-friendly slider state at a high level to ensure UI synchronization without triggering full-page re-renders.
